summary: Verified 3 UI fixes: (1) Notification panel now opens ABOVE the bell button (grows upward), (2) DEV Portal Switcher correctly highlights only Founder Portal when admin on /admin, only Operations Portal when admin on /ops, and only specific operator account when logged as that operator, (3) CSS dialog scroll fixes verified in index.css for PWA mobile scrolling.
passed_tests: Notification panel position - opens ABOVE button (panel bottom: 872, bell top: 880)
Portal Switcher as Admin on /admin - Founder Portal marked Active, Operations Portal NOT active
Portal Switcher as Operator - Operations Portal NOT marked Active, operator account IS marked Active
CSS scroll fix verified - [role='dialog'] has touch-action: pan-y and -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch
Edit Operator Dialog has max-h-[85vh] overflow-y-auto classes for scrollability
critical_code_review_comments: NotificationBell.js line 112: bottom: 'calc(100% + 8px)' correctly positions panel above button
Sidebar.js line 437: isActive logic correctly handles admin, ops_view, and operator email matching
index.css lines 1219-1236: Dialog scroll CSS properly applied with touch-action and overscroll-behavior
seed_data_creation: Used existing Test Manager operator account for portal switching test
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 UI tweaks have been verified working: notification panel grows upward, portal switcher highlighting is correct for operators (ops_view isActive requires user.role === admin), and dialog CSS has touch scroll properties.
